default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard Ben Church to GrowthX.ai's engineering team and provide an overview of current projects and future goals.](https://fathom.video/share/Qf4XnRHTQsusyZWZavRY9byWk1PYxYzS?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX.ai is transitioning away from AirOps and Airtable to in-house solutions (Atlas and Flow)](https://fathom.video/share/Qf4XnRHTQsusyZWZavRY9byWk1PYxYzS?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)
  - [Flow is a workflow orchestration framework with potential for open-source release](https://fathom.video/share/Qf4XnRHTQsusyZWZavRY9byWk1PYxYzS?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
  - [Atlas is the client-facing application for managing content creation pipelines](https://fathom.video/share/Qf4XnRHTQsusyZWZavRY9byWk1PYxYzS?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)
  - [Long-term vision includes scaling the growth agency model and potentially productizing the Flow framework](https://fathom.video/share/Qf4XnRHTQsusyZWZavRY9byWk1PYxYzS?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)

## Topics

### Project Overview: Atlas and Flow

  - [Atlas: Client-facing application for managing content creation pipelines](https://fathom.video/share/Qf4XnRHTQsusyZWZavRY9byWk1PYxYzS?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
      - [Replaces AirOps and Airtable functionality](https://fathom.video/share/Qf4XnRHTQsusyZWZavRY9byWk1PYxYzS?tab=summary&timestamp=573.0)
      - [Features include project management, pipelines, and context artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/Qf4XnRHTQsusyZWZavRY9byWk1PYxYzS?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
      - [Built with Next.js](https://fathom.video/share/Qf4XnRHTQsusyZWZavRY9byWk1PYxYzS?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
  - [Flow: Workflow orchestration framework](https://fathom.video/share/Qf4XnRHTQsusyZWZavRY9byWk1PYxYzS?tab=summary&timestamp=971.0)
      - [Handles LLM interactions and API calls](https://fathom.video/share/Qf4XnRHTQsusyZWZavRY9byWk1PYxYzS?tab=summary&timestamp=993.0)
      - [Potential for open-source release](https://fathom.video/share/Qf4XnRHTQsusyZWZavRY9byWk1PYxYzS?tab=summary&timestamp=1599.0)
      - [Separate from Flow Studio (UI for Flow)](https://fathom.video/share/Qf4XnRHTQsusyZWZavRY9byWk1PYxYzS?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)

### Team Structure and Responsibilities

  - [Clint, Stefano, and Jumpy: Focused on Flow and Flow Studio](https://fathom.video/share/Qf4XnRHTQsusyZWZavRY9byWk1PYxYzS?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
  - [Brad: Generalist, currently helping with Atlas](https://fathom.video/share/Qf4XnRHTQsusyZWZavRY9byWk1PYxYzS?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
  - [Ren and George Main: Working on Airtable replacement features](https://fathom.video/share/Qf4XnRHTQsusyZWZavRY9byWk1PYxYzS?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)

### Current Development Priorities

  - [Completing Atlas features to replace AirOps functionality](https://fathom.video/share/Qf4XnRHTQsusyZWZavRY9byWk1PYxYzS?tab=summary&timestamp=573.0)
  - [Improving Flow Studio to make workflow creation more accessible](https://fathom.video/share/Qf4XnRHTQsusyZWZavRY9byWk1PYxYzS?tab=summary&timestamp=2054.0)
  - [Refining the structure of the Flow framework for potential productization](https://fathom.video/share/Qf4XnRHTQsusyZWZavRY9byWk1PYxYzS?tab=summary&timestamp=1708.0)

### Future Vision and Goals

  - [Scale the growth agency model using AI-powered tools](https://fathom.video/share/Qf4XnRHTQsusyZWZavRY9byWk1PYxYzS?tab=summary&timestamp=1712.0)
  - [Potentially productize the Flow framework for other industries (e.g., recruiting, virtual assistants)](https://fathom.video/share/Qf4XnRHTQsusyZWZavRY9byWk1PYxYzS?tab=summary&timestamp=1908.0)
  - [Aim for $12-20 million ARR from the agency side of the business](https://fathom.video/share/Qf4XnRHTQsusyZWZavRY9byWk1PYxYzS?tab=summary&timestamp=1881.0)

### Technical Considerations

  - [Need to improve packaging of workflow files outside the Flow system](https://fathom.video/share/Qf4XnRHTQsusyZWZavRY9byWk1PYxYzS?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)
  - [Considering a GitHub-based workflow similar to dbt for managing workflows](https://fathom.video/share/Qf4XnRHTQsusyZWZavRY9byWk1PYxYzS?tab=summary&timestamp=2256.0)
  - [Balancing code-first approach with user-friendly interfaces for non-technical users](https://fathom.video/share/Qf4XnRHTQsusyZWZavRY9byWk1PYxYzS?tab=summary&timestamp=2190.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Ben to meet with Jason Gong to understand client-side usage of the tools](https://fathom.video/share/Qf4XnRHTQsusyZWZavRY9byWk1PYxYzS?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)
  - [Ben to explore making edits to the codebase, potentially starting with prompt previews in Flow](https://fathom.video/share/Qf4XnRHTQsusyZWZavRY9byWk1PYxYzS?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)
  - [Schedule regular weekly meetings between Ben and Daniel for the first month](https://fathom.video/share/Qf4XnRHTQsusyZWZavRY9byWk1PYxYzS?tab=summary&timestamp=2693.0)
  - [Daniel to focus on supporting the team more and reducing IC work once current projects are stabilized](https://fathom.video/share/Qf4XnRHTQsusyZWZavRY9byWk1PYxYzS?tab=summary&timestamp=2730.0)
